title: Empowerment
wikitext:
[[File:Lantern_Corps.jpg|center|650px|The eight Lantern Corps are all empowered by the emotion tied to their color.]]

==Summary==
'''Empowerment''' is the ability to strengthen oneself due to various circumstances and outside forces that may or may not be under their control. Unlike [[Statistics Amplification]], empowerment is often involuntary and inherent to each character rather than an activated ability.

==Limitation==
*Might become weakened when faced with an opposing force/emotion (I.E. a person empowered by compassion starts feeling hate).
*A lack of their force/emotion could cause them to lose their power entirely.

==Users==
*The Lantern Corps ([[DC Comics]]); empowered by their respective emotions
*N Ma (Mahou Sentai Magiranger); empowered by his enemy's despair
*Waterbenders and Firebenders ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender]]); empowered by a full moon or sunlight, respectively
*[[Hulk (Marvel Comics)|The Hulk]] ([[Marvel Comics]]); empowered by anger
*[[Khorne|The]] [[Slaanesh|Gods]] [[Nurgle|of]] [[Tzeentch|Chaos]] ([[Warhammer 40,000]]); empowered by their respective concepts
*[[Freddy Krueger]] (A Nightmare on Elm Street); empowered by people's knowledge and fear of him
*[[Mine]] ([[Akame ga Kill!]]); empowered by danger
*[[Percy Jackson (character)|Percy Jackson]] ([[Riordanverse]]); empowered by water
*[[Chosen Undead|The Chosen Undead]] ([[Dark Souls]]); empowered by souls
*[[Frisk]] ([[Undertale]]); empowered by their determination
